{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.7,

    "RX.1": 1.0,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,

    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The artifact is structurally a gap statement and contribution claim; whether the three strands are correctly reconstructed and the framing is coherent is plausibly in scope under any reading of 'check'.",
    "R1.2": "The logical chain — prior work establishes X, X leaves gap Y, present work fills Y — is checkable and would be load-bearing under a substantive review interpretation.",
    "R1.4": "The section makes an explicit novelty claim (Lagrangian multipliers lose constraint-enforcing power under rolling re-planning; this gap is distinct and unaddressed); verifying that delta against cited prior art is a natural 'check' on a related-work passage.",
    "R1.6": "Writing polish is the most natural surface reading of a bare 'check this' instruction on a prose excerpt, so it remains central even if other dims are also active."
  },
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "By 'check this,' do you mean evaluate writing quality and clarity only, or assess the substantive content — specifically whether the gap argument is logically sound and the novelty claim holds against prior work?"
}

rationale.R1.1: The artifact is structurally a gap statement and contribution claim; whether the three strands are correctly reconstructed and the framing is coherent is plausibly in scope under any reading of 'check'.
rationale.R1.2: The logical chain — prior work establishes X, X leaves gap Y, present work fills Y — is checkable and would be load-bearing under a substantive review interpretation.
rationale.R1.4: The section makes an explicit novelty claim (Lagrangian multipliers lose constraint-enforcing power under rolling re-planning; this gap is distinct and unaddressed); verifying that delta against cited prior art is a natural 'check' on a related-work passage.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is the most natural surface reading of a bare 'check this' instruction on a prose excerpt, so it remains central even if other dims are also active.

parsed.clarification_question: By 'check this,' do you mean evaluate writing quality and clarity only, or assess the substantive content — specifically whether the gap argument is logically sound and the novelty claim holds against prior work?
